title: Air-Fried Crispy Egyptian Snapper Fish Stir-fry
description: A dense and fermented brunch-mood Egyptian dish featuring snapper fish, air-fried to a crispy texture and keto-friendly.
instructions: Preheat your air fryer to 375°F (190°C). Rinse the snapper fish fillets under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season both sides of the fish evenly with salt, pepper, cumin, garlic powder, smoked paprika. Let sit for about 10 minutes for flavors to develop.
Place the seasoned fish on a wire rack set in the basket of your air fryer. Drizzle it lightly with olive oil and sprinkle lemon juice over the top.
Air-fry the fish for about 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy. Flip halfway through cooking to ensure even browning.
Remove from the air fryer and let sit for a minute before serving. Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Serve immediately as a snack or light meal, optionally paired with lemon wedges.
